title: The Adventure Plus
description: This modpack contains almost 120+ mods that will enhance the Vanilla experience.
body:
# **Welcome. This is a new form of adventure play. But there is still the simplicity of playing. The original style is still there. And add more adventures in various dimensions and fun playing with magic.**

## **Features** : _features is a creative mod that adds a new crafting system and add-ons, such as a variety of map mods or magic_

- 🌲🍁Magic Increase your experience in playing magic.
- 🔅🍁Adventure The new style of adventure is still simple.
- 🌾🍁 Adventure style New designs in various dimensions.
- 🌲🌱 World Adventure - Terralith and in lncendium.
- 🔅🕳Optimize game For fps Boost And Shader Bulid in.
- 🌱🍁Adventure And Fantasy Magic modpack
- 🌾🌲modpack use 4-5 gb ram but play in sht ader 8-10 gb
- 🌱🍁mod in mopack 100 mods.
- 🌲🌱Optifine Not Support.
-  ### Resource pack
> -  [🍁🌱Quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)
> -  [🍁🔅Stay true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)
  
- ### Shaderpack
> - [🔅Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
> - [🔅Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)
> - [🔅Super Duper Vanilla Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla)

- ### Link To Curse Forge 
> - [🌲🌾Curse Forge Edition](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-adventure-plus-forge/files/5261730)
 

**_The Modpack Made for My Friendes in my sever smp._**
